SRC_TAURI/src\\models\\borehole.rs:
use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
pub struct Borehole {
    pub hole_id: String,
    pub easting: Option<f64>,
    pub northing: Option<f64>,
    pub elevation: Option<f64>,
    pub final_depth: Option<f64>,
    pub date_start: Option<String>,
    pub date_end: Option<String>,
    pub method: Option<String>,
    pub crs: Option<String>,
    pub project_name: Option<String>,
    pub client: Option<String>,
    pub contractor: Option<String>,
    pub location_desc: Option<String>,
    pub water_level: Option<f64>,
    pub quality_score: Option<u8>,
    pub layers: Vec<GeologyLayer>,
    pub samples: Vec<Sample>,
    pub spts: Vec<SptResult>,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
pub struct GeologyLayer {
    pub top: f64,
    pub base: f64,
    pub description: String,
    pub legend_code: Option<String>,
    pub confidence: f64,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
pub struct Sample {
    pub depth_top: f64,
    pub depth_base: Option<f64>,
    pub sample_type: String,
    pub sample_id: Option<String>,
    pub confidence: f64,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
pub struct SptResult {
    pub depth: f64,
    pub n_value: Option<u32>,
    pub seating: Option<String>,
    pub main: Option<String>,
    pub confidence: f64,
}

impl Borehole {
    pub fn new(hole_id: String) -> Self {
        Self {
            hole_id, easting: None, northing: None, elevation: None,
            final_depth: None, date_start: None, date_end: None,
            method: None, crs: None,
            project_name: None, client: None, contractor: None,
            location_desc: None, water_level: None, quality_score: None,
            layers: vec![], samples: vec![], spts: vec![],
        }
    }
}
SRC_TAURI/Cargo.toml:
[package]
name = "borehole-iq"
version = "2.0.0"
edition = "2021"
authors = ["Orven Fajardo"]

[lib]
name = "borehole_iq_lib"
crate-type = ["lib"]

[build-dependencies]
tauri-build = { version = "2", features = [] }

[dependencies]
once_cell = "1.19"
tauri = { version = "2", features = ["tray-icon"] }
tauri-plugin-dialog = "2"
tauri-plugin-shell = "2"
serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
serde_json = "1"
tokio = { version = "1", features = ["full"] }
regex = "1"
chrono = { version = "0.4", features = ["serde", "clock"] }
uuid = { version = "1", features = ["v4"] }
quick-xml = { version = "0.37", features = ["serialize"] }
image = "0.25"
thiserror = "1"
log = "0.4"
env_logger = "0.11"
reqwest = { version = "0.12", features = ["json", "blocking"] }
calamine = "0.33"
whatlang = "0.16"

[features]
default = ["custom-protocol"]
custom-protocol = ["tauri/custom-protocol"]

[profile.release]
codegen-units = 16
lto = false
opt-level = "s"
strip = true
